description: Launch-diverse prompt fixture set for the 20-prompt canary matrix. Every prompt stays simulated/local-safe; complex/backend/integration prompts do not require real external APIs or payments.

files.summary: Landing page and marketing waitlist funnel with forms, demo modal, and admin-lite signup view.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Portfolio and case study showcase site with project gallery, filtering, and contact form.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Interactive ROI calculator with configurable inputs, chart visualization, and report export simulation.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Task and habit tracker with streaks, categories, calendar views, and progress visualization.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Pricing and plan comparison page with tiered plans, feature matrices, FAQ, and simulated CTA flow.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no real payments.

files.summary: Blog and content hub with article listing, search, categories, tags, and newsletter signup.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Operations command center with dashboards, workspaces, reports, team roles, permissions matrix, and audit log.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: AI document intelligence workspace with simulated streaming analysis, risk scoring, and chat follow-up.
files.local_safe_notes: AI output is simulated locally; no real AI providers or external APIs.

files.summary: CRM sales pipeline with deals, stages, contacts, activity timeline, and forecast.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Agency client portal with projects, invoices, messages, shared files, and approvals.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Salon booking app with service selection, staff calendar, time slots, and appointment management.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Warehouse inventory control system with stock tracking, purchase orders, receiving workflow, and reorder rules.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Project management app with Kanban boards, task details, roadmap, team workload, and simulated collaboration.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Contractor marketplace directory with search, profiles, reviews, bidding simulation, and job posting.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory, no external APIs.

files.summary: Social community app with content feed, member profiles, groups, messaging, and moderation queue.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory; messaging is simulated, no external APIs.

files.summary: Ecommerce storefront with product catalog, cart, simulated checkout flow, and order history.
files.local_safe_notes: Payment and checkout are simulated locally; no real payment processors or external APIs.

files.summary: Slack-style team messaging app with channels, DMs, threads, reactions, typing indicators, and search.
files.local_safe_notes: Realtime is simulated locally; no WebSocket server or external APIs.

files.summary: Personal finance tracker with spending, budgets, savings goals, bills, and cashflow visualization.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory; no bank connections, payment processors, or external APIs.

files.summary: Admin panel for user/permissions management with roles, audit log, SSO placeholders, and security toggles.
files.local_safe_notes: All data in-memory; SSO is a placeholder, no external APIs.

files.summary: AI support chatbot workspace with simulated conversational AI, knowledge base, agent escalations, and training eval.
files.local_safe_notes: AI responses are simulated locally; no real AI providers or external APIs.
